findings.evidence: `rg -n "(ofGroupLike|ofTrivial|tensorGroupLike|tensorTrivial)_(id|comp)|def tensor(GroupLike|Trivial)" .../Trivial.lean` finds `ofGroupLike_id`/`ofGroupLike_comp` at lines 133/144 and `ofTrivial_id`/`ofTrivial_comp` at lines 343/350, but only the tensor constructor definitions at lines 255 and 429.
findings.fix: Add `tensorGroupLike_id`, `tensorGroupLike_comp`, `tensorTrivial_id`, and `tensorTrivial_comp` lemmas, simp-annotated, expressing preservation of `Comodule.Hom.id` and `Comodule.Hom.comp`.
findings.issue: `Hom.tensorGroupLike` and `Hom.tensorTrivial` expose tensoring of morphisms but do not provide identity/composition simp lemmas, unlike the existing `ofGroupLike`/`ofTrivial` constructors.

summary: The new coaction APIs are characterized and simp-annotated, but the tensor morphism constructors lack the functoriality API needed for the stated monoidal-category target.
